description: apispot.io provides domain-related lookup functions including WHOIS queries, availability checks, batch processing, database queries, and domain rank lookups. Publicly discoverable documentation was limited to an APIs.guru-hosted OpenAPI description for this service.
summary: apispot.io exposes one documented HTTP API: the Bulk WHOIS API at `https://apispot.io/api`, described by an OpenAPI spec and secured by an API key (`ApiKeyAuth`).
